LinuxDefaultEnvVariables.DefaultKeepList: COLORS, DISPLAY, HOSTNAME, HISTSIZE, KDEDIR, LS_COLORS, MAIL, PS1, PS2, QTDIR, USERNAME, LANG, LC_ADDRESS, LC_CTYPE, LC_COLLATE, LC_IDENTIFICATION, LC_MEASUREMENT, LC_MESSAGES, LC_MONETARY, LC_NAME, LC_NUMERIC, LC_PAPER, LC_TELEPHONE, LC_TIME, LC_ALL, LANGUAGE, LINGUAS, _XKB_CHARSET, XAUTHORITY, TEMP
LinuxDefaultEnvVariables.DefaultDeleteList: IFS, CDPATH, LOCALDOMAIN, RES_OPTIONS, HOSTALIASES, NLSPATH, PATH_LOCALE, LD_LIBRARY_PATH, TERMINFO, TERMINFO_DIRS, TERMPATH, TERMCAP, ENV, BASH_ENV, PS4, GLOBIGNORE, SHELLOPTS, JAVA_TOOL_OPTIONS, PERLIO_DEBUG, PERLLIB, PERL5LIB, PERL5OPT, PERL5DBFPATH, NULLCMD, READNULLCMD, ZDOTDIR, TMPPREFIX, PYTHONHOME, PYTHONPATH, PYTHONINSPECT, RUBYLIB, RUBYOPT

Apple Container: is a tool that you can use to create and run Linux containers as lightweight virtual machines on your Mac. It's written in Swift, and optimized for Apple silicon and maintained by Apple Inc.

Apple Container: is a tool that you can use to create and run Linux containers as lightweight virtual machines on your Mac. It's written in Swift, and optimized for Apple silicon and maintained by Apple Inc.

Restart Computer
Restart Computer
 
Your computer must be restarted to complete the CyberArk EPM Agent upgrade. Before clicking on the "Restart Now" button be sure to save all your work. Note: Until the computer is restarted, some components will not run correctly.

Dialog.name: Intuit Security Alert - APE - KB (Default - Internet) macOS

GUI.Dialog:
Application Privilege Elevation required for this activity

Application

 <$VF_FILE_NAME>

Vendor

<$VF_COMPANYNAME_NAME>
Publisher <$VF_PUBLISHER>

As part of Intuit's Endpoint Privilege Elevation (EPE) policy, local admin

privileges have been disabled on this device. If you need to install or upgrade

this software for business purposes, please submit an Application Elevation Request.


Your request will be processed within the same business day. For more information, visit this KB Article.
Your System Administrator collects information about use of applications requiring administrative privileges. Please provide your justification for using this application and click "OK". Your explanation will be sent to the System Administrator.
I need application <$VF_FILE_DESCRIPTION> (<$VF_FILE_NAME>)
Option 2
Option 3
Option 4
Option 5
Enter justification:

Dialog.name: Intuit Security Alert - EPE - P2 - Windows

GUI.Dialog:
Application requires admin privileges (UAC)

Application Privilege Elevation required for this activity
 
Description

<$VF_FILE_NAME>
Publisher <$VF_PUBLISHER>
Version <$VF_PRODUCT_VERSION>

As part of Intuit’s Application Usage Standards, this application you are attempting to launch/install requires a security review.


If you need to install or upgrade this software for business purposes, please submit an Application Elevation Request.


To learn more, visit this KB article.
This application requires administrative privileges in order to run properly. To request the ability to run this application as administrator, please provide your justification below and click "OK". Your request will be sent to the System Administrator.
I need application <$VF_FILE_DESCRIPTION> (<$VF_FILE_NAME>)
Option 2
Option 3
Option 4
Option 5
Enter justification:
Enter your email address to allow your System Administrator to notify you when this request is approved:
Don't show me again

Request Administrative Privileges
Request Administrative Privileges
 
Write your message here.
Request temporary administrator access for a limited time (1-120 hours)
Any other request
Provide details below

<$VF_USER_DISPLAYNAME> Please provide a business justification to obtain administrative privileges to perform activities (e.g install or update software or troubleshoot technical issues).

Approval of the request may take up to 15 minutes and once granted, administrative privileges will expire in 1 hour. For additional information please refer to the following KB article.
Option 1
Option 2
Option 3
Option 4
Option 5
Enter justification:

EPM is redirecting you for further step-up authentication
EPM is redirecting you for further authentication to confirm elevation

WhatsApp is not an approved business communication tool and will be blocked soon. Only use approved channels like Slack, Outlook and Zoom for all business communication. If you believe you have a valid business need for using WhatsApp, tell us about your use case and why approved business communication tools won't suffice.

Description <$VF_FILE_NAME>
Bundle <$VF_BUNDLE_NAME>
Publisher <$VF_PUBLISHER>

The software you’re attempting to install is not allowed on this device. According to Intuit's Acceptable Use Policy, only software from approved providers can be installed on an Intuit workstation or device


If you have a legitimate business need for this software, please submit an exception request. To learn more about the submission process, refer to the exception section of this KB Article


For additional context, please visit the Understanding Workforce Application Usage Standard page

Bundle <$VF_BUNDLE_NAME>

Canva is not approved for use at Intuit. For image and graphic design needs, use Adobe Express or browse our complete list of approved workforce tools. Questions? Reach out in #intuit-approved-apps.

Canva will be restricted soon
Description <$VF_FILE_NAME>
Bundle <$VF_BUNDLE_NAME>
Publisher <$VF_PUBLISHER>
EPM is redirecting you for further step-up authentication
EPM is redirecting you for further authentication to confirm elevation

Canva is not approved for use at Intuit and will be blocked starting on June 17. Please switch to approved workforce tools like Adobe Express for your image and graphic design needs. To keep your Canva media files, transfer them to Adobe Express using import tools provided within the platform. Questions? Reach out in #intuit-approved-apps.
Your System Administrator collects information about use of applications requiring administrative privileges. Please provide your justification for using this application and click "OK". Your explanation will be sent to the System Administrator.
